name: HRT_MEMBERSHIP_ITEMS_V
query: SELECT PROFILE_ITEM_ID AS MEMBERSHIP_ID , BUSINESS_GROUP_ID , PROFILE_ID , PARENT_PROFILE_ITEM_ID , SECTION_ID , CONTENT_TYPE_ID , CONTENT_ITEM_ID AS CONTENT_ITEM_ID , ITEM_TEXT240_2 AS AFFILIATION_NAME , ITEM_DATE_2 AS MEMBERSHIP_START_DATE , ITEM_DATE_3 AS MEMBERSHIP_END_DATE , ITEM_TEXT240_12 AS MEMBERSHIP_NUMBER , ITEM_TEXT240_1 AS TITLE , ITEM_DATE_5 AS POSITION_START_DATE , ITEM_DATE_7 AS POSITION_END_DATE , ITEM_TEXT240_3 AS MANDATE_POSITION , ITEM_NUMBER_1 AS FEE , ITEM_TEXT240_5 AS MONTHLY_TIME_COMMITMENT , ITEM_TEXT240_10 AS VOLUNTEER_CAUSE , ITEM_CLOB_2 AS DESCRIPTION , ITEM_CLOB_1 AS COMMENTS , ITEM_TEXT240_4 AS AWARDING_BODY , ITEM_TEXT30_7 AS SUBSCRIPTION_PAY_METH , ITEM_TEXT30_11 AS STATUS , ITEM_TEXT30_2 AS CURRENT_VOLUNTEER_FLAG , ITEM_TEXT30_9 AS INTERNAL_ORG_FLAG , ITEM_TEXT30_15 AS RELATED_ITEM_FLAG, ITEM_NUMBER_9 AS EDUCATIONAL_ESTABLISHMENT_ID , ITEM_TEXT2000_1 AS EDUCATIONAL_ESTABLISHMENT , ITEM_TEXT30_3 AS FEE_CURRENCY , ITEM_TEXT240_13 AS MEMBERSHIP_CATEGORY , ITEM_TEXT2000_2 AS ORGANIZATION_URL , ITEM_TEXT240_11 AS PROFESSIONAL_BODY_NAME , ITEM_TEXT30_1 AS CURRENT_MEMBERSHIP_REQ_FLAG , ITEM_DATE_6 AS MEMBERSHIP_DATE, MANDATORY AS REQUIRED_FLAG, DATE_FROM, DATE_TO, IMPORTANCE AS IMPORTANCE, SOURCE_ID , SOURCE_TYPE , SOURCE_KEY1 , SOURCE_KEY2 , SOURCE_KEY3 , ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY , ATTRIBUTE1 , ATTRIBUTE2 , ATTRIBUTE3 , ATTRIBUTE4 , ATTRIBUTE5 , ATTRIBUTE6 , ATTRIBUTE7 , ATTRIBUTE8 , ATTRIBUTE9 , ATTRIBUTE10 , ATTRIBUTE11 , ATTRIBUTE12 , ATTRIBUTE13 , ATTRIBUTE14 , ATTRIBUTE15 , ATTRIBUTE16 , ATTRIBUTE17 , ATTRIBUTE18 , ATTRIBUTE19 , ATTRIBUTE20 , ATTRIBUTE21 , ATTRIBUTE22 , ATTRIBUTE23 , ATTRIBUTE24 , ATTRIBUTE25 , ATTRIBUTE26 , ATTRIBUTE27 , ATTRIBUTE28 , ATTRIBUTE29 , ATTRIBUTE30 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19 , ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE1 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE2 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE3 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE4 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE5 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE6 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE7 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE8 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE9 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE10 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE11 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE12 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE13 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE14 , ATTRIBUTE_DATE15 , OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER , CREATED_BY , CREATION_DATE , LAST_UPDATED_BY , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN , ITEM_TEXT30_8 AS REQUIREMENT_TYPE FROM HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS WHERE CONTENT_TYPE_ID = 110
